originalAlarm.description: Value stored to 'driver_data' is never read

model:
(define-fun CONFIG_UNIX98_PTYS () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_DEVPTS_MULTIPLE_INSTANCES () Bool
  false)
reasoning: 7acf6cd80b2.c L39: driver_data dead store. In the success path of the UNIX98_PTYS code, driver_data is assigned at L39 but this assigned value is never subsequently read. PC: CONFIG_UNIX98_PTYS=T (CONFIG_DEVPTS_MULTIPLE_INSTANCES cancels — both T and F variants present). No restrictive library macros. New bug, correctly constrained PC. Consistent with TRANSFORMATION_67 (TRUE_NEW) and TRANSFORMATION_153 (TRUE_NEW).
